verse_text: But He said, 'More than that, blessed are those who hear the word of God and keep it!'

links.context: A blessing is promised to those who read and hear (see [[LUK.11:28]]). This is the first of the seven beatitudes of the Revelation, found also in 14:13; 16:15; 19:9; 20:6; 22:7, 14. Blessed here are both the reader and the hearers (the assembled faithful), provided they heed what is read--for faith and works are inseparable. Time (Gr. kairos) means here an eschatological decisive moment--a time of judgment, a critical moment, the time when all is fulfilled.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
